import axios from"axios";import{CONFIG}from"../config";import{getToken,clearAuthData}from"../utils/localStorage";const httpClient=axios.create({baseURL:CONFIG.API_URL,headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"}});// intercepteur execute avant chaque requête
